name: Sniper Turret
notes: Scrapyard's specialty defense. A Turret variant - highest single-hit damage and longest range of any Turret variant, but the slowest attack speed, and damageTypes: [Piercing] bypasses the target's flat armor stat entirely. Fits Scrapyard's heavy-armor theme from the counter side — Salvage Works produces heavy armor, Sniper Turret is what picks off an approaching heavy tank at range before it closes distance, rather than needing to out-tank it up close. No splash, no status effect, no domain bonus — pure high-damage precision shot is the whole specialization.
